title: lobelia baumannii
intro: Lobelia baumannii, also known as Indian tobacco, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae, native to the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Lobelia baumannii include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as pain relief and improved circulation. Lobelia baumannii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
